title: Billy's Origins
description: Billys Origins is a hardcore player role based modpack with additions and content for every unique Origin. With enhanced sea floors to the stars in the sky you'll never find yourself bored.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/124248c0d768d371f0e94b7d06686f1bb2c7bc90.jpeg)

Billy's Origins is a hardcore modpack that makes the Origin's idea more impactful and interesting; with over 300 mods making it hard to not find something new in the world!

Many Origins have unique abilities and debuffs that strongly effects the way you can play and having the need to work in a team. For example a feline can easily see in caves where as most others see nothing but the pitch black but can't mine stone which forces the players to tag along with each other!

![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1f5daa7724af9079d998b77b4f1354e5604414b.jpeg)

**DISCORD:** https://discord.gg/9NZ7BXueSA



**I don't take credit for any of the mods in the modpack!**
